profile.name: open-design

intro.title: Open Design: The open-source Claude Design alternative
intro.desc: 🔥 **Open Design 0.10.0 is here: the all-in-one Agentic design workspace.** The whole craft now lives in one window — go from a vague idea to discovering references, gathering material, editing interactively, queuing comments, polishing motion, and handing off to an editor or a Code Agent — without leaving the app. With parallel sessions, it stops feeling like one assistant and starts feeling like a local design team .
